TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == pihacen mahachac nu imelang a libung nu Taywan == 2003 mihcaan tulu a bulad, pihacen mahachac nu imelang (SARS) nu libung a nikudan, maala ku Taywan.mahkataytayni i Tawan kina SARS, namakahicaay a imelangan, namakaycaay a nikalalidan, ahican mipuu'd kina libung nai' henay ku watanan, macunus aca ku Taywan caay kaw kitakid nu kapulungan a padekuan nu cabay, caay pakaala tu kalamkamay nu hinzian atu sapapadangaw, saisa inasyekay caay tu ka asuasu' ku nikaudip atu nika lawlawan nu balucu'. 2003ŚĻī3śúą, (SARS) .Śú®SARS . itini nina SARS a imelang atu mamilalid, hamaw sa a idaw tu ku mamingaay tina libungan, WHO atu Amilika a ci-pin-kun-ce-ci matatulin a tayni i Taywan miedap tu nikudan, u Cun-hua-min-kuo sihu malingatu misakawaw tinaahican mipuud tu sakaylibung a kawawan, tawya a libung naw namakaydaay i hekalay micumud alaw malimad mapatideng i Taypak He-pin-padekauan i labu nu kalalidan a niyadu'an tu libungan a kawawan, ahebal ku nikalalidan namakaamis Tawan ahebal satu taydan i cun, tumul Taywan. hican mipuud kina libung a kawawan mitamudungay tina kawawan u Sin-cen-yun-wi-sen-su misaahebal katukuh i Cun-hua-min-kuo-sin-cen-yun, hamin nu Sin-cen-yun, pasu Nei-cen-pu',Kuo-fun-pu' atu Cin-ci-pu' nu si-cen-yun a sasaay a hamin nu mikuliay a tademaw, macunus aca nu paybinawlan, alaw itida i 2330 mihcaan pitu a bulad lima a demiad namaka Taywan WHO a SARS kalalidan malibung a mabulican ku ngangan. Śú®SARS ,WHO WHOÁöĄSARSśĄüśüďŚćÄťô§Śźć. kawaw nu sihuśĒŅŚļúšĹúÁāļ patucek tu micidekay a sasulitanŚą∂Ť®āÁČĻŚą•śĘĚšĺč pacicien a sisatabu tu lawayŚľ∑Śą∂šĹ©śąīŚŹ£ÁĹ© mangalay tu nikawada' nu SARS a nikalibungan misuayaw tu kakacawan a nikalalidan, itida sa i tu nikanan, anu i labu tu nu hikuki kanca a matabuan tu ku laway, anu u itiniay tu a mikacaway tu hikukian a tademaw, anu namukan satu, itini i labu nu hikukian kanca a matabu tu ku laway, duma satu nu micumuday nu balungaan a tademaw atu mikacaway tu balungaan a tademaw kanca a matabuan tu ku laway. ÁāļťôćšĹéSARS . misiteked malaliyas tu lumaay a tademawŚĮ¶śĖĹŚĪÖŚģ∂ťöĒťõĘ lima a bulad tusa a lasubu nu demiad, Wi-sen-su ayda malingatu tu tu sakay malaliyas nu lumaay a tademaw, nina sapacici malaliyas a kawawan sadayumen sa, namakayni a demiad pulung han a musakamu u "malaliyas i luma'" idaw ku nikababenisan tu A,B an. 5śúą20śó•, ",šł¶ŚćÄŚąÜA,BÁīö. A ci: u caayay henay kaw malalucekay nu namalaliday nu SARS a tademaw, pasu lumaay a tademaw, kapud mikuli a tademaw, micudaday, u tadacabay atu patucekan a padekuan nu tademaw, itini i cacay a bataan nu pikisaan , sipakayda i mikuwanay a dan-wi anu mahang tu, kiya idaw ku sapidiputaw tu sakalecad a kawawan, acaay ka tahekal, u mahiniay a tademaw idaw ku mikuwanay tu sapikacawan tu kakadidengan. B ci: u namakayda i malibungay a niyadu'an taluma', inai' ku cancanan nu adada a tademaw, taneng sisatabu tu laway a tahekal " mahida muculil, micakay tu tuud, mibakah tu tatuni'" anu mahida sinicu atu mahidaay u SARS a adadaan, kanca a patelay tu mikuwanay a kakulian idaw ku niwanan tu kakadidengan tayda i padekuwan paising. milmek tu sasakamuen ku Cun-kuo tina libungan, sisa malahat katukuh i Ya-cuo nu kitakidan a kanatalan. Taypak Hepin padekuwan ilabu a sakalalid caay ka kalah misilud, sisa ina libung namaka Taypak malahad katukuh i cun timul a kitidaan. sisa lusepnum a tademaw ku malaliday, walcay a tademaw ku mapatayay. sipakayda i WHO anihapuan, Taywan namaka "SARS malibungay a niyadu'an" a mabulic ku ngangan mikikaka tu dumaan a kanatalan, Taywan sipnem demiad, Cia-na-ta nemsep demiad, Pei-ci piclim demiad, Sin-cia-puo picnem demiad, Kun-tun siwwal dimiad, sipakayni i sakay SARS nu kabiyalawan, mikikaka tu Sin-cia-puo, Sen-kun idaw ku laheci mikabiyalaw milaheci tina kawawan. itni i WHO " SARS aidangan a katalawan nu niyadu'an" saan, u Taywan tuwal a dimiadan mabulic t uku ngangan, u saamelikay nu kitidaan, pasuTaypak sipcay a dimiadan, mikikaka tu Sen-kun, Kun-tun, Pei-ci kuyu mikikaka tu amilik. idaw i tusepseplu mihcaan a SARS miput tu libung ni tanengan, Tawan sihu itida i caypic mihcaan tu nikuda tuseptusep mihcaan, mikawaw tina pihaceng picidekan milaliday tu haykikaku a imelan " COWID-19" a kawawan, u sakapahay nu kitakidan a kanatalan.
S.PHON: == pińßa ¶…ôn mańßa ¶ńßa ¶ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺibuŇč nu tajwan == **** mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad, pińßa ¶…ôn mańßa ¶ńßa ¶ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč (sa*s) nu r~…ĺibuŇč a nikudan, maar~…ĺa ku tajwan.mańßkatajtajni i tawan kina sa*s, namakańßi ¶aaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, namakaj ¶aaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan, ańßi ¶an mipuu Ē~ °d kina r~…ĺibuŇč nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku watanan, ma ¶unus a ¶a ku tajwan ¶aaj kaw kitakid nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a pad…ôkuan nu ¶abaj, ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺamkamaj nu ńßinzian atu sapapadaŇčaw, saisa inasj…ôkaj ¶aaj tu ka asuasu Ē~ ° ku nikaudip atu nika r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. *******, (sa*s) .*sa*s . itini nina sa*s a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu mamir~…ĺar~…ĺid, ńßamaw sa a idaw tu ku mamiŇčaaj tina r~…ĺibuŇčan, wńßo atu amir~…ĺika a ¶i-pin-kun- ¶…ô- ¶i matatur~…ĺin a tajni i tajwan mi…ôdap tu nikudan, u ¶un-ńßua-min-kuo sińßu mar~…ĺiŇčatu misakawaw tinaańßi ¶an mipuud tu sakajr~…ĺibuŇč a kawawan, tawja a r~…ĺibuŇč naw namakajdaaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mi ¶umud ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺimad mapatid…ôŇč i tajpak ńß…ô-pin-pad…ôkauan i r~…ĺabu nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan a nijadu Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺibuŇčan a kawawan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan namakaamis tawan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ satu tajdan i ¶un, tumur~…ĺ tajwan. ńßi ¶an mipuud kina r~…ĺibuŇč a kawawan mitamuduŇčaj tina kawawan u sin- ¶…ôn-jun-wi-s…ôn-su misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ katukuńß i ¶un-ńßua-min-kuo-sin- ¶…ôn-jun, ńßamin nu sin- ¶…ôn-jun, pasu n…ôi- ¶…ôn-pu Ē~ °,kuo-fun-pu Ē~ ° atu ¶in- ¶i-pu Ē~ ° nu si- ¶…ôn-jun a sasaaj a ńßamin nu mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw, ma ¶unus a ¶a nu pajbinawr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺaw itida i **** mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima a d…ômiad namaka tajwan wńßo a sa*s kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan mar~…ĺibuŇč a mabur~…ĺi ¶an ku ŇčaŇčan. *sa*s ,wńßo wńßo*sa*s*****. kawaw nu sińßu**** patu ¶…ôk tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a sasur~…ĺitan****** pa ¶i ¶i…ôn a sisatabu tu r~…ĺawaj****** maŇčar~…ĺaj tu nikawada Ē~ ° nu sa*s a nikar~…ĺibuŇčan misuajaw tu kaka ¶awan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan, itida sa i tu nikanan, anu i r~…ĺabu tu nu ńßikuki kan ¶a a matabuan tu ku r~…ĺawaj, anu u itiniaj tu a mika ¶awaj tu ńßikukian a tad…ômaw, anu namukan satu, itini i r~…ĺabu nu ńßikukian kan ¶a a matabu tu ku r~…ĺawaj, duma satu nu mi ¶umudaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a tad…ômaw atu mika ¶awaj tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a tad…ômaw kan ¶a a matabuan tu ku r~…ĺawaj. ***sa*s . misit…ôk…ôd mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw****** r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad tusa a r~…ĺasubu nu d…ômiad, wi-s…ôn-su ajda mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu tu sakaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas nu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, nina sapa ¶i ¶i mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas a kawawan sadajum…ôn sa, namakajni a d…ômiad pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan a musakamu u "mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °" idaw ku nikabab…ônisan tu a,b an. *****, ",***a,b*. a ¶i: u ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj kaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj nu namar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu sa*s a tad…ômaw, pasu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, kapud mikur~…ĺi a tad…ômaw, mi ¶udadaj, u tada ¶abaj atu patu ¶…ôkan a pad…ôkuan nu tad…ômaw, itini i ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu pikisaan , sipakajda i mikuwanaj a dan-wi anu mańßaŇč tu, kija idaw ku sapidiputaw tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kawawan, a ¶aaj ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, u mańßiniaj a tad…ômaw idaw ku mikuwanaj tu sapika ¶awan tu kakadid…ôŇčan. b ¶i: u namakajda i mar~…ĺibuŇčaj a nijadu Ē~ °an tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, inai Ē~ ° ku ¶an ¶anan nu adada a tad…ômaw, tan…ôŇč sisatabu tu r~…ĺawaj a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ " mańßida mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mi ¶akaj tu tuud, mibakańß tu tatuni Ē~ °" anu mańßida sini ¶u atu mańßidaaj u sa*s a adadaan, kan ¶a a pat…ôr~…ĺaj tu mikuwanaj a kakur~…ĺian idaw ku niwanan tu kakadid…ôŇčan tajda i pad…ôkuwan paisiŇč. mir~…ĺm…ôk tu sasakamu…ôn ku ¶un-kuo tina r~…ĺibuŇčan, sisa mar~…ĺańßat katukuńß i ja- ¶uo nu kitakidan a kanatar~…ĺan. tajpak ńß…ôpin pad…ôkuwan ir~…ĺabu a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺid ¶aaj ka kar~…ĺańß misir~…ĺud, sisa ina r~…ĺibuŇč namaka tajpak mar~…ĺańßad katukuńß i ¶un timur~…ĺ a kitidaan. sisa r~…ĺus…ôpnum a tad…ômaw ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj, war~…ĺ ¶aj a tad…ômaw ku mapatajaj. sipakajda i wńßo anińßapuan, tajwan namaka "sa*s mar~…ĺibuŇčaj a nijadu Ē~ °an" a mabur~…ĺi ¶ ku ŇčaŇčan mikikaka tu dumaan a kanatar~…ĺan, tajwan sipn…ôm d…ômiad, ¶ia-na-ta n…ôms…ôp d…ômiad, p…ôi- ¶i pi ¶r~…ĺim d…ômiad, sin- ¶ia-puo pi ¶n…ôm d…ômiad, kun-tun siwwar~…ĺ dimiad, sipakajni i sakaj sa*s nu kabijar~…ĺawan, mikikaka tu sin- ¶ia-puo, s…ôn-kun idaw ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mikabijar~…ĺaw mir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tina kawawan. itni i wńßo " sa*s aidaŇčan a katar~…ĺawan nu nijadu Ē~ °an" saan, u tajwan tuwar~…ĺ a dimiadan mabur~…ĺi ¶ t uku ŇčaŇčan, u saam…ôr~…ĺikaj nu kitidaan, pasutajpak sip ¶aj a dimiadan, mikikaka tu s…ôn-kun, kun-tun, p…ôi- ¶i kuju mikikaka tu amir~…ĺik. idaw i tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan a sa*s miput tu r~…ĺibuŇč ni tan…ôŇčan, tawan sińßu itida i ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan tu nikuda tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan, mikawaw tina pińßa ¶…ôŇč pi ¶id…ôkan mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu ńßajkikaku a im…ôr~…ĺan " ¶owid-**" a kawawan, u sakapańßaj nu kitakidan a kanatar~…ĺan.
S.FORM: == pihacen mahachac nu imelang a libung nu Taywan == 2003 mihcaan tulu a bulad, pihacen mahachac nu imelang (SARS) nu libung a nikudan, maala ku Taywan.mahkataytayni i Tawan kina SARS, namakahicaay a imelangan, namakaycaay a nikalalidan, ahican mipuu'd kina libung nai' henay ku watanan, macunus aca ku Taywan caay kaw kitakid nu kapulungan a padekuan nu cabay, caay pakaala tu kalamkamay nu hinzian atu sapapadangaw, saisa inasyekay caay tu ka asuasu' ku nikaudip atu nika lawlawan nu balucu'. 2003ŚĻī3śúą, (SARS) .Śú®SARS . itini nina SARS a imelang atu mamilalid, hamaw sa a idaw tu ku mamingaay tina libungan, WHO atu Amilika a ci-pin-kun-ce-ci matatulin a tayni i Taywan miedap tu nikudan, u Cun-hua-min-kuo sihu malingatu misakawaw tinaahican mipuud tu sakaylibung a kawawan, tawya a libung naw namakaydaay i hekalay micumud alaw malimad mapatideng i Taypak He-pin-padekauan i labu nu kalalidan a niyadu'an tu libungan a kawawan, ahebal ku nikalalidan namakaamis Tawan ahebal satu taydan i cun, tumul Taywan. hican mipuud kina libung a kawawan mitamudungay tina kawawan u Sin-cen-yun-wi-sen-su misaahebal katukuh i Cun-hua-min-kuo-sin-cen-yun, hamin nu Sin-cen-yun, pasu Nei-cen-pu',Kuo-fun-pu' atu Cin-ci-pu' nu si-cen-yun a sasaay a hamin nu mikuliay a tademaw, macunus aca nu paybinawlan, alaw itida i 2330 mihcaan pitu a bulad lima a demiad namaka Taywan WHO a SARS kalalidan malibung a mabulican ku ngangan. Śú®SARS ,WHO WHOÁöĄSARSśĄüśüďŚćÄťô§Śźć. kawaw nu sihuśĒŅŚļúšĹúÁāļ patucek tu micidekay a sasulitanŚą∂Ť®āÁČĻŚą•śĘĚšĺč pacicien a sisatabu tu lawayŚľ∑Śą∂šĹ©śąīŚŹ£ÁĹ© mangalay tu nikawada' nu SARS a nikalibungan misuayaw tu kakacawan a nikalalidan, itida sa i tu nikanan, anu i labu tu nu hikuki kanca a matabuan tu ku laway, anu u itiniay tu a mikacaway tu hikukian a tademaw, anu namukan satu, itini i labu nu hikukian kanca a matabu tu ku laway, duma satu nu micumuday nu balungaan a tademaw atu mikacaway tu balungaan a tademaw kanca a matabuan tu ku laway. ÁāļťôćšĹéSARS . misiteked malaliyas tu lumaay a tademawŚĮ¶śĖĹŚĪÖŚģ∂ťöĒťõĘ lima a bulad tusa a lasubu nu demiad, Wi-sen-su ayda malingatu tu tu sakay malaliyas nu lumaay a tademaw, nina sapacici malaliyas a kawawan sadayumen sa, namakayni a demiad pulung han a musakamu u "malaliyas i luma'" idaw ku nikababenisan tu A,B an. 5śúą20śó•, ",šł¶ŚćÄŚąÜA,BÁīö. A ci: u caayay henay kaw malalucekay nu namalaliday nu SARS a tademaw, pasu lumaay a tademaw, kapud mikuli a tademaw, micudaday, u tadacabay atu patucekan a padekuan nu tademaw, itini i cacay a bataan nu pikisaan , sipakayda i mikuwanay a dan-wi anu mahang tu, kiya idaw ku sapidiputaw tu sakalecad a kawawan, acaay ka tahekal, u mahiniay a tademaw idaw ku mikuwanay tu sapikacawan tu kakadidengan. B ci: u namakayda i malibungay a niyadu'an taluma', inai' ku cancanan nu adada a tademaw, taneng sisatabu tu laway a tahekal " mahida muculil, micakay tu tuud, mibakah tu tatuni'" anu mahida sinicu atu mahidaay u SARS a adadaan, kanca a patelay tu mikuwanay a kakulian idaw ku niwanan tu kakadidengan tayda i padekuwan paising. milmek tu sasakamuen ku Cun-kuo tina libungan, sisa malahat katukuh i Ya-cuo nu kitakidan a kanatalan. Taypak Hepin padekuwan ilabu a sakalalid caay ka kalah misilud, sisa ina libung namaka Taypak malahad katukuh i cun timul a kitidaan. sisa lusepnum a tademaw ku malaliday, walcay a tademaw ku mapatayay. sipakayda i WHO anihapuan, Taywan namaka "SARS malibungay a niyadu'an" a mabulic ku ngangan mikikaka tu dumaan a kanatalan, Taywan sipnem demiad, Cia-na-ta nemsep demiad, Pei-ci piclim demiad, Sin-cia-puo picnem demiad, Kun-tun siwwal dimiad, sipakayni i sakay SARS nu kabiyalawan, mikikaka tu Sin-cia-puo, Sen-kun idaw ku laheci mikabiyalaw milaheci tina kawawan. itni i WHO " SARS aidangan a katalawan nu niyadu'an" saan, u Taywan tuwal a dimiadan mabulic t uku ngangan, u saamelikay nu kitidaan, pasuTaypak sipcay a dimiadan, mikikaka tu Sen-kun, Kun-tun, Pei-ci kuyu mikikaka tu amilik. idaw i tusepseplu mihcaan a SARS miput tu libung ni tanengan, Tawan sihu itida i caypic mihcaan tu nikuda tuseptusep mihcaan, mikawaw tina pihaceng picidekan milaliday tu haykikaku a imelan " COWID-19" a kawawan, u sakapahay nu kitakidan a kanatalan.

tajwan mi…ôdap tu nikudan, u ¶un-ńßua-min-kuo sińßu mar~…ĺiŇčatu misakawaw tinaańßi ¶an mipuud tu sakajr~…ĺibuŇč a kawawan, tawja a r~…ĺibuŇč naw namakajdaaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mi ¶umud ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺimad mapatid…ôŇč i tajpak ńß…ô-pin-pad…ôkauan i r~…ĺabu nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan a nijadu Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺibuŇčan a kawawan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan namakaamis tawan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ satu tajdan i ¶un, tumur~…ĺ tajwan. ńßi ¶an mipuud kina r~…ĺibuŇč a kawawan mitamuduŇčaj tina kawawan u sin- ¶…ôn-jun-wi-s…ôn-su misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ katukuńß i ¶un-ńßua-min-kuo-sin- ¶…ôn-jun, ńßamin nu sin- ¶…ôn-jun, pasu n…ôi- ¶…ôn-pu Ē~ °,kuo-fun-pu Ē~ ° atu ¶in- ¶i-pu Ē~ ° nu si- ¶…ôn-jun a sasaaj a ńßamin nu mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw, ma ¶unus a ¶a nu pajbinawr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺaw itida i **** mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima a d…ômiad namaka tajwan wńßo a sa*s kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan mar~…ĺibuŇč a mabur~…ĺi ¶an ku ŇčaŇčan. *sa*s ,wńßo wńßo*sa*s*****. kawaw nu sińßu**** patu ¶…ôk tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a sasur~…ĺitan****** pa ¶i matabuan tu ku r~…ĺawaj, anu u itiniaj tu a mika ¶awaj tu ńßikukian a tad…ômaw, anu namukan satu, itini i r~…ĺabu nu ńßikukian kan ¶a a matabu tu ku r~…ĺawaj, duma satu nu mi ¶umudaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a
